title: Excise taxes and other levies memoranda - Canada.ca
content:
## Excise taxes and other levies memoranda

## Proposed temporary reductions of excise tax rates on certain types of fuel
The Government of Canada proposed temporary reductions of the federal excise tax rates on certain type of fuel
For more information, refer to Notice ETSL82, Proposed temporary rate reductions of excise tax on certain types of fuel
These memoranda provide detailed technical information about the application and administration of excise taxes and the tax on insurance premiums.
- X2-2 Small manufacturers
- X2-3 Bonds given as security by licensed wholesalers
- X3-1 Goods subject to excise tax
- X3-2 Liability for tax
- X6-1 Books and records
- X6-2 Returns and payments
- X6-3 Objections and appeals
- X7-1 Special levies – Insurance premiums

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
